message:
Add .bv/ to .gitignore for beads viewer local config

The bv (beads viewer) tool creates a .bv/ directory for local
configuration and cached graph state. This is machine-specific
and should not be tracked, similar to the existing .claude/
exclusion for AI agent ephemeral files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,3 +44,6 @@ fuzz/artifacts/
 
 # Claude Code / AI agent ephemeral files
 .claude/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
